EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} failed to send an email from the address {subject.id} to {datafield8} recipients due to the policies: {datafield6}
The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} failed to send an email from the address {subject.id} to {datafield8} recipients
The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} failed to send an email from the address {subject.id} to the address {object.id}
The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} sent an email from the address {subject.id} to the address {object.id} in violation of the policies: {datafield6}
The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} sent an email from the address {subject.id} to {datafield8} recipients
The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} failed to send an email from the address {subject.id} to the address {object.id} due to the policies: {datafield6}
The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} sent an email from the address {subject.id} to the address {object.id}
The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} sent an email from the address {subject.id} to {datafield8} recipients in violation of the policies: {datafield6}
